THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT OF JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT IS CONTINUED (PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE) TO MAY 3, 2013 WHEN ANOTHER JUDGE WILL BE SITTING IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE MILLER HAS RECUSED HERSELF. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT OF JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT EVERGREEN ENTERPRISES, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION TO THE REQUEST FOR ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE HEARING ON THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET FOR JUNE 14, 2013 AT 1:45 P.M. IN DEPARTMENT 504 BEFORE JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. THE MOVING PAPERS ON THE REQUEST FOR THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SHALL BE TREATED AS THE MOVING PAPERS FOR THAT HEARING. ANY RESPONSE TO THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND REPLY PAPERS MUST BE FILED AND SERVED ON THE SAME SCHEDULE AS IF THIS WERE A MOTION NOTICED FOR JUNE 14, 2013. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Continued To Jul-19-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment By Deft
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER's Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment By Defendant eVERGREEN ENTERPRISES, INC. IS Granted. No opposition to the request for issuance of an order to show cause filed and for good cause shown. The hearing on the Order to Show Cause is set for June 14, 2013 at 1:45 p.m. in Department 504 before Judge Peter J. Busch. The moving papers on the request for this order to show cause shall be treated as the moving papers for that hearing. Any response to the order to show cause and reply papers must be filed and served on the same schedule as if this were a motion noticed for June 14, 2013. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment By Deft
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER's Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Of Judgment By Defendant is continued (Per order of the Presiding Judge) to May 3, 2013 when another Judge will be sitting in Department 302. Judge Miller has recused herself. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
